message:
Extract parity contract validator, enhance failure bundles and MVCC lifecycle

- differential_v2.rs: Extract validate_parity_contract() method from
  inline checks in run_differential_with_mode. Consolidates all envelope
  validation into a single reusable validator with structured error messages.
- failure_bundle.rs: Enhanced failure bundle handling with improved
  artifact capture and diagnostic detail
- bd_mblr_3_2 e2e test: Updated CI e2e matrix artifact upload gate test
- lifecycle.rs: MVCC lifecycle improvements for transaction handling
- engine.rs: Minor VDBE engine adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
